title: Problem (Make Avg) - Solve the complete problem

content.problemStatement:
You are given 2 integers - AAA and CCC.

You need to find if there exists any integerintegerinteger BBB which meets the following condition


BBB must be an integer
BBB is the average of AAA and CCC.

Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two space-separated integers AAA and CCC, the given integers.


Output Format
For each test case, output −1-1−1 if there exists no integer BBB which is the average of AAA and CCC. Else, output the value of BBB.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Considering B=4B = 4B=4, BBB is the average of 333 and 555.
Test case 222: Considering B=6B = 6B=6, BBB is the average of 666 and 666. 
Test case 333: There exists no integer BBB such that BBB can be the average of 222 and 777.
